justification.headline: Fallback proposal - LLM output failed validation
justification.detailed_reasoning: Rule-based fallback applied. 29.28 units at risk with 0.62 days to expiry. Modifier 0.58 derived from risk ratio 0.77, floored at recovery rate 0.58 (buyback=0.07 + repurposing=0.51). Manual review required.
